question: How many days before the team meeting I was preparing for did I attend the workshop on 'Effective Communication in the Workplace'?
ground_truth_answer: 7 days. 8 days (including the last day) is also acceptable.

judge_response.label: CORRECT
judge_response.reasoning: The context shows the workshop was on January 10th and the team meeting was on January 17 (the year 2026 appears to be a data error given the 2023 question date), which is 7 days apart, matching the gold answer.
